# Narrativee

Narrativee is a premium AI-powered newsletter repurposing and social distribution platform designed for content creators, publishers, and Substack writers. It automatically learns a creator's unique voice, extracts multiple high-performing angles from a single newsletter issue, compiles platform-native posts, and schedules them.

## Core Capabilities

- **Voice Memory engine**: Remembers and replicates writing voices dynamically per channel (e.g., highly polished for LinkedIn, short and punchy for X, conversational for Threads/Instagram).
- **Atomic Angle Extraction**: Turns a single newsletter issue into multiple distinct, high-performing angles (contrarian, tactical, emotional, key takeaway) instead of simple generic summaries.
- **Channel Compilers**: Custom formatting models for Substack, Medium, LinkedIn, X, Threads, Instagram, Facebook, and Bluesky.
- **Substack Notes Scheduler**: An advanced feature that automates publishing and scheduling of Substack Notes from a consolidated browser dashboard using a companion Chrome Extension.
- **Feedback Loop**: Analyzes published analytics and engagement patterns to continuously improve the voice profiles and content angles over time.

## Target Audience & Use Cases

- **Substack Creators**: Automating social distribution, scheduling Substack Notes, and driving organic subscriptions.
- **Newsletter Publishers**: Repurposing deep-dive newsletter issues into multi-channel marketing campaigns.
- **Social Media Managers**: Accelerating post generation and maintaining strict brand tone guidelines without manual prompting.

## Product Navigation & Links

- **Homepage**: [https://narrativee.com](https://narrativee.com) - Core landing page, workflow demonstrations, and product moat details.
- **Pricing & Plans**: [https://narrativee.com/pricing](https://narrativee.com/pricing) - Starter and Creator plans. Free 14-day trials are available for all tiers.
- **Creator Onboarding**: [https://narrativee.com/auth/signup](https://narrativee.com/auth/signup) - Create a free account and start building a content graph.
- **Sign In**: [https://narrativee.com/auth/signin](https://narrativee.com/auth/signin) - Access the workspace dashboard and scheduler.

## Technical Details

- **Deployment**: Powered by Cloudflare Workers and global CDN infrastructure.
- **Companion Tooling**: Integrates seamlessly via the official Narrativee Chrome Extension for direct local browser automation on Substack.
- **Privacy Standard**: Features a strict zero-database policy for scraped Substack reader metrics and raw publication content. All scraped data is processed locally.
